name: Nutty Chicken Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. 12 ounces boned, skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1x3-inch strips
2. In a shallow dish, combine cornflake crumbs, pecans, parsley, salt, and garlic powder.
3. Dip each piece of chicken in milk, then roll in the crumb mixture.
4. Place the coated pieces in a baking pan.
5. Bake at 400°F for 7-9 minutes, or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink.
Per serving: 217 calories, 23 g protein, 7 g carbohydrates, 10 g fat, 59 mg cholesterol, 178 mg sodium, 245 mg potassium.
